# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder
  labels:
    app: ci-cd-builder
    role: build
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder-sa
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
  - name: builder
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      runAsNonRoot: true
      runAsUser: 1000
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_HOST
      value: tcp://localhost:2376
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY
      value: "1"
    - name: DOCKER_CERT_PATH
      value: /certs/client
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-certs
      mountPath: /certs
      readOnly: true
    - name: workspace
      mountPath: /workspace
    - name: tmp
      mountPath: /tmp
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "512Mi"
        cpu: "500m"
      limits:
        memory: "2Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
  - name: docker-daemon
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
      value: /certs
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY
      value: "1"
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-certs
      mountPath: /certs
    - name: docker-storage
      mountPath: /var/lib/docker
    - name: tmp-dind
      mountPath: /tmp
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "1Gi"
        cpu: "1000m"
      limits:
        memory: "4Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
  volumes:
  - name: docker-certs
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: docker-storage
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: workspace
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: tmp
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: tmp-dind
    emptyDir: {}
  automountServiceAccountToken: true
  restartPolicy: Never
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-sa
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-role
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["secrets"]
  verbs: ["get"]
  resourceNames: ["docker-registry-credentials"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-builder-binding
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: ci-cd-builder-sa
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: ci-cd-builder-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
